predicates.name: does_not_provide_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: not_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

predicates.name: not_covered_by_eu_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person is not covered by EU free movement law.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person does not or no longer satisfies the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_or_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure determining or transferring to the member state responsible for examining an international protection request.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed.

predicates.name: all_case_circumstances_considered
predicates.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

predicates.name: current_and_real_reasons_to_assume_absconding
predicates.description: There are current and real reasons to assume that the person will abscond.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: After illegal entry or during illegal stay, the person did not submit a residence application.

predicates.name: international_protection_request_late
predicates.description: The person did not make the request for international protection within the time limit provided by law.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or forged documents in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means
predicates.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, stay, establishment, or removal rules.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_unsuspended_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with a less coercive measure intended to guarantee transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_public_order_or_national_security_restrictive_measure
predicates.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with a restrictive measure intended to guarantee public order or national security.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

predicates.name: subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: new_application_immediately_after_refusal_end_or_removal_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal, end-of-stay decision, refusal-of-entry measure, or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsible_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having already given fingerprints in another state bound by the rules on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_title_outcome
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple international protection requests or residence applications in relevant states that led to negative decisions or no residence title.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_responsible_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by the rules on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_application
predicates.description: The person declared or the file shows that the person came for purposes other than those of the international protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine for lodging a manifestly unlawful appeal before the competent tribunal.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_document
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognized_as_national_and_laissez_passer_promised
predicates.description: The national authority of the person's country recognized the person as a national and declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: nationality_category_allows_minister_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to one of the procedures relevant to assessing risk of absconding.

predicates.name: absconding_objective_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one statutory objective criterion for risk of absconding is met for the person.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as a foreigner.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as a third-country national.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person is legally considered to be in illegal stay.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A statutory risk of absconding is legally established for the person.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as an identified foreigner.
